title: Civic Center Plaza - SF Civic Center
content: Civic Center Community Benefit District logo. # Civic Center Plaza. 355 McAllister St. San Francisco, CA 94102. Extending from City Hall to Fulton Plaza, and from the Bill Graham Civic Auditorium to the Superior and Supreme Courts of California — this public space is home to large scale events and celebrations as well as daily activation: the Helen Diller Civic Center Playgrounds and Limoncello. On certain days visitors can find hot food vendors (Wednesdays during Heart of the City Farmers’ market), Annie’s Hot Dog Cart and smaller community events, outdoor art installations and more. See our events calendar for current and upcoming Civic Center Plaza activation. ## More Public Spaces. 1 United Nations Plaza, San Francisco CA 94102. **Helen Diller Civic Center Playgrounds**. 55 Larkin St. San Francisco, CA 94102. Fulton Street at Larkin Street, San Francisco CA 94102.
